message:
test: add 38-test proptest suite for mission_agent_mail (ft-3681t.3.4)

Property-based tests covering serde roundtrips (12 types), canonical
thread-id determinism and sanitization, recipient deduplication, envelope
embedding/parsing roundtrips, ack-required filtering, overdue deadline
computation, acknowledgement routing, and convenience method semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
